## Workout Summary

The key metrics at a glance

Explore how active you've been this week, this month, this year, and all time.

Features breakdowns by category and stats like Active Time and Workout Frequency.

The charts and tables help you understand training volume and consistency.

## Exercise Calendar

Session history visualized

Browse your workout history in monthly and yearly timeline modes.

Features streak highlighting and color-coding of activity types.

The calendar view helps you recognize patterns and variations over time.

![Image 4: Streakout app preview – Exercise calendar](https://streakout.app/img/mockups/iphone-3.webp)

![Image 5: Streakout app preview – Workout summary (this year and all time)](https://streakout.app/img/mockups/iphone-4.webp)

## Training Insights

Beyond raw stats

Keep an eye on the indicators that actually make a difference.

Features rich charts that visualize short and long-term trends.

Insights help you better understand your training habits and overall direction.

## Session Details

A deeper look

Drill down into individual session stats like Active Calories and Average Pace.

Features metadata and tiles with all the key metrics of your workout.

The detail view gives you the full context behind every workout.

![Image 6: Streakout app preview – Session details](https://streakout.app/img/mockups/iphone-5.webp)

![Image 7: Streakout app preview – Activity type details (surfing)](https://streakout.app/img/mockups/iphone-6.webp)

## Activity Types

The training composition

Explore stats and insights by activity type and category.

Features a calendar heatmap, session counts, and recent activity.

The breakdowns help you establish a balanced exercise routine.
